title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse III Posts
description: The Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Nurse III Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B. Sc Nursing, GNM can apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, s...
